title: Star Wars: Episode I Racer Official Nintendo Player's Guide
content:
{{Top|rwm|leg|ref|title=''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'' Official Nintendo Player's Guide}} {{MoreSources}} {{ReferenceBook |image=[[File:Racer_Nintendo.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer''
Official Nintendo Player's Guide |author=*[[Scott Pelland]] {{C|Senior Writer}}[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer Official Nintendo Player's Guide|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'' Official Nintendo Player's Guide]] *[[Nathan Bihldorff]], [[Levi Buchanan]], [[Jason Leung]] {{C|Writers/Editors}} |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor=*[[Leslie Swan]] {{C|Editor in Chief}} *Scott Pelland {{C|Executive Editor}} *[[Jessica Joffe Stein|Jessica Joffe]] {{C|Copy Editor}} |publisher=[[Nintendo|Nintendo of America]] |release date=c. [[June]] [[1999]][[Star Wars: Episode I Racer Official Nintendo Player's Guide|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'' Official Nintendo Player's Guide]] was advertised as being available in the final pages of {{BookCite|title=[[Nintendo Power]]|number=issue 121|publisher=[[Nintendo|Nintendo of America]]|date=[[June]] [[1999]]|link=https://archive.org/details/nintendo-power-issue-127-december-1999/Nintendo%20Power%20Issue%20121%20June%201999}} |type=Paperback |pages=112 |dimensions= |weight= |isbn=0454066910 |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'' Official Nintendo Player's Guide''', also called '''''Star Wars'' Episode I: Racer Player's Guide''',[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer Official Nintendo Player's Guide|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'' Official Nintendo Player's Guide]] copyright section was a strategy guide for the [[1999]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']] from [[LucasArts]] published by [[Nintendo|Nintendo of America]] for the ''[[Nintendo Power]]'' magazine in around [[June]] 1999. It was written by [[Scott Pelland]] and [[Nathan Bihldorff]], [[Levi Buchanan]] and [[Jason Leung]]. ==Development== The credited publisher for ''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'' Official Nintendo Player's Guide was was [[M. Arakawa]] with [[Yoshio Tsuboike]] as associate publisher, [[Leslie Swan]] as editor in chief, [[Scott Pelland]] as executive editor, [[Jessica Joffe Stein|Jessica Joffe]] as copy editor and [[Nancy Ramsey]] as production coordinator. Pelland was the guide's senior writer, [[Nathan Bihldorff]], [[Levi Buchanan]], [[Jason Leung]] were each credited as "Writers/Editors", and [[Eric Bush]], [[Michael Leslie]] and [[Jeffrey Storbo]] served as game consultants. [[Kim Logan]] served as art director, with [[Jay Wergin]] as "Design/[[Wikipedia:Prepress|Prepress]] Supervisor". The guide's strategic layout was done by [[Kyle Stanley Hunter]] and [[Chris Inclenrock|Christopher Inclenrock]] for [[V Design|V-Design, Inc.]] under V-Design's art director and design coordinator [[Yoshi Orimo]] and [[Sonja Morris]], with art by [[LucasArts]] and [[Lucasfilm]]. [[Natt Thangvijit]], [[David Waterworth]] and [[Van Williams]] were credited as responsible for electronic prepress, with [[Todd Dyment]] as prepress assistant. The guide was printed in the [[Wikipedia:United States|United States]] and published by [[Nintendo|Nintendo of America Inc.]] {{Book-stub}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars: Episode I Racer Official Nintendo Player's Guide}} {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{WebCite|url=https://archive.org/details/star-wars-episode-i-racer-players-guide|text=Star Wars: Episode I: Racer: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide}} {{Episode1Multimedia}} {{Interlang |ka=Star Wars, Episode I: Racer: Nintendo-ს მოთამაშის ოფიციალური მეგზური }} [[Category:Strategy guides|Episode I Racer Official Nintendo Player's Guide]]
